SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

Class ElfSymbolTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection
net.boricj.bft.elf.sections.ElfSymbolTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>, Collection<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>, List<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>, SequencedCollection<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>, IndirectList<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class ElfSymbolTable extends ElfSection implements IndirectList<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>
ELF symbol table section containing symbol entries. Symbols represent functions, variables, sections, and other named entities.

    ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol
    An ELF symbol table entry.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfSymbolTable

      public ElfSymbolTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfStringTable stringTable)
      Creates a new symbol table with default settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      stringTable - string table for symbol names

    • ElfSymbolTable

      public ElfSymbolTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfStringTable stringTable)
      Creates a new symbol table with specified settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      stringTable - string table for symbol names

    • ElfSymbolTable

      public ElfSymbolTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize) throws IOException
      Reads a symbol table from an ELF file.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      parser - ELF file parser
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      size - section size in bytes
      link - index of associated string table
      info - index of first non-local symbol
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • addDefined

      public ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol addDefined(String name, long offset, long size, ElfSymbolType type, ElfSymbolBinding binding, ElfSection section)
      Adds a defined symbol.
      Parameters:
      name - symbol name
      offset - offset within the section
      size - symbol size
      type - symbol type
      binding - symbol binding
      section - section containing the symbol
      Returns:
      the created symbol

    • add

      public ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol add(String st_name, long st_value, long st_size, ElfSymbolType type, ElfSymbolVisibility visibility, ElfSymbolBinding binding, ElfSection st_sh)
      Adds a symbol with a section reference.
      Parameters:
      st_name - symbol name
      st_value - symbol value
      st_size - symbol size
      type - symbol type
      visibility - symbol visibility
      binding - symbol binding
      st_sh - section containing the symbol
      Returns:
      the created symbol

    • add

      st_value - symbol value
      st_size - symbol size
      type - symbol type
      visibility - symbol visibility
      binding - symbol binding
      st_shndx - section index
